message:
feat(fwc): add mesh availability, explain-availability, and repair-hints subcommands

Introduce three new fwc mesh subcommands for connector runtime availability
and artifact provenance. Live mode (host-admin-api backed) shows desired/observed
state, drift, recovery actions, artifact provenance with content hash/signature
verification, placement policy, and offline readiness. Offline mode (workspace-
manifest backed) shows declared zones, manifest metadata, and planning-only
repair hints. Enrich fwc install with structured source selection via
PreparedPackageSourceKind (4 variants), offline readiness metadata, and
post-install status tracking. Includes mock test helpers and integration tests
for offline, live+explain, and live+zone rejection paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
